convention: art/generated/<category>/<id>.png is picked up automatically when the file exists; an explicit entry below overrides the convention path. Missing images are never an error - rendering falls back to the generated colors/shapes.
variant_convention: FQ-09V: consecutive files <id>_01.png, <id>_02.png, ... (max 8; the first gap ends the scan) form an optional variant pool, or an explicit entry below may be an array of paths. Blocks pick one variant deterministically from world seed + cell position; the choice never enters saves. A single <id>.png (or no file at all) keeps working exactly as before.
